Public Remarks: Great 3 bedroom, 2 bath block home in Seminole. New roof 2021. Updated kitchen with stainless appliances. Large fenced backyard. Close to Seminole beaches, shopping, and top-rated Pinellas County schools. Easy access to US-19.
Directions: US-19 to 86th Ave, west to 82nd St, north to 9th Ave N, left to property on right.
